# Cosmic Phantom Prism
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Cosmic%20Phantom%20Prism&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Cosmic Phantom Prism
| slot = prism
| tier = GL
| soulbound = yes
| desc = A prism of the cosmos, capable of warping dimensions, causing mirages of the user to appear everywhere.

| cost = 90
| fameb = 6
| decoyDistance = 8
| decoySpeed = 1.23

| effects = yes
| decoy = 8
| teleport = yes

| bonuses = {{Stat|vit|3}} {{Stat|wis|3}}

| lootbag = white
}}
<noinclude>
{{NavPrisms}}
</noinclude><noinclude>
[[Category:Prisms]]</noinclude>
